FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct ExpanderTemplateSettings

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Computed template settings for the Expander (the typed-record convention — see Tween): the chevron rotation and whether the content panel participates, derived once from the open state. Mirrors the geometry WinUI's generated ExpanderTemplateSettings binds into its chevron storyboard.

public readonly record struct ExpanderTemplateSettings : IEquatable<ExpanderTemplateSettings>
Implements
IEquatable<ExpanderTemplateSettings>

Constructors

ExpanderTemplateSettings(float, bool)

Computed template settings for the Expander (the typed-record convention — see Tween): the chevron rotation and whether the content panel participates, derived once from the open state. Mirrors the geometry WinUI's generated ExpanderTemplateSettings binds into its chevron storyboard.

public ExpanderTemplateSettings(float ChevronRotationDeg, bool ContentVisible)

ChevronRotationDeg float
ContentVisible bool

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
